subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! O thou that speakest My praise! We have remembered thee time and again, and have sent down unto thee that wherefrom those near unto God have inhaled the sweet fragrance of thy Lord's grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی یا ایتها الناطقه بثنائی انا ذکرناک مره بعد مره و انزلنا لک ما وجد منه المقربون عرف عنایه ربک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
